raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The California Desert Conservation Program aims to acquire, preserve, restore, and enhance desert conservation habitat.",
    "AB 1183 would authorize the California Wildlife Conservation Board to administer the California Desert Conservation Program.",
    "AB 1183 includes preservation of cultural resources as a purpose of the desert conservation program.",
    "The California Desert Conservation Program Fund Account will be established to allow deposits from private, federal, and other sources.",
    "Funding from the California Desert Conservation Program will address climate change impacts and protect sacred ancestral lands of indigenous people.",
    "The California Desert Conservation Area is populated by 19 million residents.",
    "The California Desert Conservation Area is home to the largest still-intact ecosystem in the lower 48 states.",
    "California's desert lands capture and store carbon, contributing to climate change mitigation."
```
